description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted standing upright with arms raised and extended outward at a sharp angle. The figure has a slender build and is dressed in a sleeveless top with a buttoned detail on one side, paired with fitted pants and flat shoes. The head is proportionate, with medium-length hair styled to fall over the shoulders. The arms are unusually elongated and stretched, creating a dramatic V-shape above the head, which is not typical for a natural human pose. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes appear practical for walking. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday urban pedestrian, but the exaggerated arm pose gives the figure a stylized or surreal quality.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian with arms dramatically raised and extended outward, standing upright in a stylized pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top, and both arms raised in a wide V-shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side seam of the top, and the full extension of the left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the back of the top and pants, and both arms extended backward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the right arm's extension, and the side of the body.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless casual top and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms raised and extended outward
